name: mobile
comment: Turborepo adapter shim only — mobile is a Flutter/Dart app, not a Node package. See docs/features/F-000/infra.md §6/§7. Scripts shell out to `flutter` (T-000-09); `./scripts/flutter.sh` picks `fvm flutter` when an fvm project pin exists (this dev machine), else plain `flutter` on PATH (CI, via subosito/flutter-action pinned by .flutter-version).
